use_cases: Landing page hero sections with interactive cursor-following highlight effects
Product showcases where elements reveal on hover with radial gradient masks
Interactive portfolio or personal website hero intros with mouse tracking
SaaS and fintech landing pages needing engaging visual hover effects
Creative tool interfaces requiring subtle interactive feedback
ai_summary: An interactive hero component featuring a cursor-following radial gradient highlight effect that reveals on hover. Uses Framer Motion for smooth mouse position tracking and supports both light and dark modes with a subtle dot pattern background texture. The highlight creates a spotlight effect that follows the user's cursor, making it ideal for creating engaging, modern landing page hero sections.
